close_reason: Positive observation: lazy kube::Client init is correct
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:22, 96-107, 144-155. K8sBackend::from_uri does not make a network call; client init is deferred to first use via tokio::sync::OnceCell. This is the correct shape for a backend whose construction is driven by URI parsing and may be done eagerly at startup for backends that will not actually be used. A future contributor may suggest 'just init in from_uri' to simplify; resist that — it forces every secretx user to have valid kube credentials at process start.
title: Lazy kube::Client init via OnceCell is the right design
